note: Fermi / propAMM oracle-priced proactive AMM. Offline harness MUST pin block.timestamp to blockTimestamp (setNextBlockTimestamp) before every quoteAmounts/cook, else the oracle staleness gate reverts StaleUpdate() (0x666a2814). The oracle price/config slots are byte-identical fresh-vs-stale — only block.timestamp gates.

contracts.role: EIP-7702 delegated EOA (quote/swap path touches its code designator via EXTCODESIZE/BALANCE; delegate 0x63c0c1…)
reserve-vault (holds token inventory; payer/payee for swap transferFrom; read via FermiSwapper storage slot 3)
